$comment: Central feature registry. One entry per user-facing feature. Every code change that adds/alters a feature updates its entry (and the README feature guide + CHANGELOG) in the same PR. `./gradlew checkDocs` audits this file against README.md, docs/img/, and the source tree, and prints the documentation-gap report. `code`/`tests` paths are relative to src/main/java/com/loadoutlab and src/test/java/com/loadoutlab respectively; `anchor` must equal the slugified '### ' heading of the feature's section in the README '# Feature guide'.

features.title: Best owned set per style
features.notes: No dedicated screenshot: the style card is visible in the game-best, optimize-modes, and incoming-damage shots. 2026-07-16: style card headers show the skill SPRITE icon (Staticons attack/ranged/magic, AssumeIcons.styleSprite) instead of the style word - sprites not glyphs (Tahoe tofu rule), tooltip carries the word. 2026-07-16 (M-2c): the classic worn-equipment layout is THE layout (compact grid + config option removed); the grid blanks host info tiles - max hit (top-left), accuracy (top-right), incoming dps with the protect-prayer sprite and full threat tooltip (right of legs).

features.title: Game-best ceiling comparison
features.capture: Game-best comparison expanded; a gold-bordered slot hovered so the you-own-BiS tooltip is visible. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Optimize modes
features.capture: Tanky selected; frame the card with the sword/shield trade row visible under the DPS line. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Incoming damage and protection prayer
features.capture: Zulrah or K'ril card with the incoming-DPS line and protect-prayer icon visible (Calvar'ion's '(unavoidable)' works too). Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Spell and spellbook recommendation
features.capture: Magic card with the recommended autocast spell icon visible and the spellbook dropdown open. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Simulated items
features.capture: Right-click menu open on an unowned game-best item showing the 'dream' toggle (or the green-highlighted dream item post-recompute). Single PNG screenshot. The green + chip above the search bar and the '...' menu offer 'Sim an item (consider as owned)...' plus a Simmed items (N) removal list.

features.title: Upgrade budget
features.capture: Budget field showing e.g. 50m with a buyable upgrade line visible under a card. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Stored elsewhere (manual owned items)
features.notes: UIM request (Discord): count STASH/POH/cold-storage gear as owned; also adds the looting bag as an automatic ledger source.
features.capture: Right-click menu open on an unowned suggestion showing 'Stored elsewhere: count ... as owned', with the green 'Stored elsewhere: N (click to manage)' label visible in the panel. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Dude, Where's My Stuff import
features.notes: Two tiers. Preferred: the storages PluginMessage contract (namespace dudewheresmystuff, storages-request/storages-response, authored upstream) - exact canonical id+qty per storage, panel line shows '(live)'. Fallback for older DWMS: best-effort read of its persisted ConfigManager data (public API, no reflection; works with DWMS disabled), strictly defensive parsing - an upstream format change drops items rather than miscounting.
features.capture: Panel with the muted 'From Dude Where's My Stuff: N items' line visible under the stored-elsewhere label. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: STASH, POH costume room, and cargo hold tracking
features.notes: No DWMS needed: the STASH chart (widget 493) marks filled units' default items owned in one read; the POH costume container (gameval 637, shared across cases) and the five sailing cargo holds scan like the bank. STASH table vendored from DWMS's StashUnit enum (BSD-2) via scripts/gen_stash_units.py. The POH shared-container union assumption and chart cell types need one in-client verification lap.
features.capture: STASH chart open with the panel beside it; after closing, a filled unit's item (e.g. the STASH'd slayer helmet) shows owned in a suggestion. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Where your gear is (location hints)
features.notes: Per-source provenance kept end-to-end: ledger source snapshots + manual list + DWMS families feed a variant-aware lookup. Only fetch-trip sources get a bottom-right cell dot (at-hand equipped/inventory/bank stay unmarked - no palette entry = no dot); the 'Stored:' legend under the cards lists EXACTLY the sources present in the current results. Tooltips add the 'stored in ...' clause for the same cells. profile.json gains an optional ownedBySource breakdown.
features.capture: A result mixing bank gear with a STASH or POH item: dots only on the fetch-trip cells, and the 'Stored:' legend under the cards showing only those entries. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Revenant and wilderness gear conditionals
features.notes: Official-calc verified to 4 decimals (craws/ursine/avarice vectors): charged wilderness weapons get 3/2 accuracy and damage vs wilderness monsters; the amulet of avarice heads the salve/slayer chain (6/5 vs revenants) and the risk model knows it skulls the wearer (kept slots 3->0, 4->1 with Protect Item); a charged bracelet of ethereum zeroes revenant incoming damage. Engine-only: no dedicated screenshot - visible on any revenant card. 2026-07-15: the +50% is gated by an "In the Wilderness" checkbox for shared-name monsters (Catacombs hellhounds no longer get buffed picks); wilderness-exclusive monsters are always in (WildernessToggleTest).

features.title: Mob profiles: pins, notes, and bank-filter items
features.notes: Per-monster remembered preferences, scoped per set or all sets. PINS (any slot, owned or not, picked via the NATIVE chatbox item search or the cell's Pin submenu): the slot has exactly one candidate, bypassing exclusions/mode/budget and the low-risk vetoes (risk totals stay honest; the cap constrains the REST via a pinned-risk floor); a style-scoped pin overlays the all-sets pin on its own card; pins shape YOUR sets only - game best stays the pure ceiling. NOTE: a collapsible post-it, edited inline (saves on focus loss), togglable off in the plugin settings ('Per-monster notes'). FILTER ITEMS: per-set or all-sets supplies (super combat on the melee card, ranged potion on ranged) unioned into that card's Show/Filter bank. Entry points live ON the style cards (header dots menu + cell right-click) and the 'This mob' line. Style cards themselves collapse to a dps header - auto-collapsed when a standard deviation under the best set. The magic card hosts the spellbook lock and a per-mob SPELL PIN (forced autocast via the engine's existing forced-spell path; gear optimizes around it).
features.capture: A mob with a style-scoped pin, the post-it note expanded, one card auto-collapsed to its dps header, and the filtered bank showing a per-set supply. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Wilderness low-risk sets
features.notes: 0.2.0: untradeable_death.json gains curated frictionGp (rebuild-errand proxies for the salve line, imbued rings/masks) counted into riskGp and convert pool values, and low-risk sets NEVER put a friction item at risk (PvpRisk.risksUnprotected rejects unprotected ones outright, any cap; protected kept-slot rides stay legal). Tooltips say 'breaks on death (rebuild errand ~X)'.
features.capture: Calvar'ion low-risk card: halo/skull/coins fates on the grid plus the risk gp line. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Slayer task toggle
features.capture: On-task card showing the slayer helmet in the set; ideally a task-locked boss greyed in the list behind. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Exclude items from suggestions
features.capture: Right-click menu open on a suggested item showing 'Exclude ... from suggestions' (or the excluded-items count line). Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Bank tools: show and filter
features.notes: Overlay + Bank Tags wiring is Swing/RuneLite-client bound (needs a live bank), verified in-client; the set math it draws from is covered by the optimizer tests.
features.capture: Bank open with 'Show in bank' outlining the set (or 'Filter bank' active); Show/Filter buttons visible in the card. Same capture moment can also serve owned-ledger. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Search in Loadout Lab (cross-plugin)
features.capture: In-world right-click menu open on a known monster showing 'Search in Loadout Lab'. Single PNG screenshot.
features.notes: onMenuOpened wiring is client-bound (no automated coverage) - verified in-client; the resolution+compute path it calls is covered by LinkInTest.

features.title: Owned-gear ledger (profile-aware)
features.capture: With a set computed, click 'Filter bank' and frame the bank: it shows exactly the recommended items - the ledger's knowledge of what you own, on screen. Same capture moment as bank-tools; save a second copy/crop under this name. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Community Discord
features.notes: Header Options menu -> 'Join our Discord' opens the community invite via LinkBrowser; Swing-only, verified in-client.
features.capture: Header Options (dots) menu open showing 'Join our Discord'. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Undo and redo
features.capture: Header with the back arrow hovered, tooltip reading 'Back: vs <monster>' after searching two monsters. Single PNG screenshot.
features.notes: Back/forward semantics over ONE stream: monster selections, panel parameters (toggles, dropdowns, budget, antifire flip) and store mutations all record into the shared CommandHistory (SelectionHistoryTest); replays drive the real controls via doClick/setSelectedIndex behind a reentrancy guard so effects fire once. First pick unrecorded so back never blanks the panel. Icons: mirrored arc = back, plain = forward.

features.title: Trip supplies
features.capture: The grey ~ chip's menu open above the search bar showing the six supply submenus and the always-filter entries, beside a card with the red/green/grey trio chips. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Thralls and Death Charge
features.capture: A boss card with the Thralls and D charge chips active in the params row, the style tab tooltip open showing the 'gear + thrall' breakdown. Single PNG screenshot.

features.title: Assumption pickers: prayer and boost
features.capture: A melee card with the prayer icon's picker menu open (Detect best checked, Chivalry and the tiers below), the boost icon beside it wearing the accent override border. Single PNG screenshot.
